scripts.build:extension: npm run build && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('extension/webview-dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && cp -r dist extension/webview-dist && cp NOTICE THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md extension/ && cd extension && npm run compile
scripts.package:extension: npm run build:extension && cd extension && npx @vscode/vsce package --allow-missing-repository
